rawAwsError: ClickHouse HTTP 500: Code: 241. DB::Exception: Query memory limit exceeded: would use 4.50 GiB (attempt to allocate chunk of 6.04 MiB), maximum: 4.50 GiB: read stage: ColumnData: column: properties_json in part-00000.parquet; MEMORY_LIMIT_EXCEEDED.
diagnosis: Attempt 15 raised the Phase 7 ClickHouse container to 8 GiB and server cap to 7 GiB, but performance-tests/phase7-integration/archive/entrypoint.py retained clickhouse_memory_bytes at 9*1024^3/2 (4.5 GiB). Attempt 17 therefore moved the binding limit from the server cap to the stale per-query cap. The failing Parquet re-read exceeded that cap by only 6.04 MiB.
smallestFix: Set only the Phase 7 archive entrypoint query memory to the archive engine's already validated MAX_CLICKHOUSE_MEMORY of 5 GiB and update the focused memory invariant tests. Retain the 7 GiB server and 8 GiB container caps.
